world.description: The IRGC claimed it had “successfully targeted” the US aircraft, though it did not immediately provide details on the location, extent of damage or the fate of the pilot. world.title: 'Land for security' in Ukraine negotiations must be rejected
world.description:
Even as the world is understandably distracted by war in the Middle East, talks to end the Ukraine-Russia war have just resumed in the United States, albeit without Russian representatives.
Since Ukraine has repeatedly signaled its resistance to even consider ceding territory, Putin’s negotiators have so far refused to join discussions.

world.title: China's Top Shipper Resumes Middle East Trips Amid Iran Ceasefire Talks
world.description: China's largest shipping company, COSCO Shipping Lines, has resumed new booking services to six key Middle Eastern destinations following Iran's agreement to allow "non-hostile vessels" through the Strait of Hormuz amid ongoing US-Iran ceasefire negotiations.
